---
title: "Project Title"
description: "One-line description of what this project does"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: [IBD, tool, Python]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Live]{.project-status .live}
<!-- Status options: [Live]{.project-status .live} / [Active]{.project-status .active} / [Planned]{.project-status .planned} -->

## Problem

What gap does this address, and why does it matter? Aim for 2 to 3 sentences a non-specialist could follow without losing the technical stakes.

## Approach

How does it work? Cover the architecture, the key design decisions, and why this path over the alternatives. If there was a previous version you moved away from, say why.

## Why this project

Optional but useful: what drew you to this specifically, what it taught you, or why it exists alongside the more formal work.

## Status

Where things stand now. What is deployed, what is in progress, what are the known limitations.

## Links

- [Live app](https://example.com)
- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/repo-name)
- [Related note](/notes/concepts/related-concept.qmd)

:::
